issues.description: SearchDeck action is missing required condition to look at exactly 5 cards from top of deck before filtering
Filter does not specify 'GERMA' type requirement or exclusion of [GERMA 66]
Second effect with Trigger and DrawCard is incorrect; card text describes placing remaining cards at bottom of deck, not drawing a card

DSL completely misrepresents the card effect. Should be single OnPlay trigger with SearchDeck (filtered for GERMA type excluding GERMA 66, max 1 card, from top 5) followed by deck reordering mechanic not captured in DSL
